name: Policy Drafter
description: Draft, rewrite, and structure internal or public-facing policies that are clear, enforceable, auditable, and understandable by the people expected to follow them.
not_for: final legal advice or attorney sign-off
step-by-step SOPs or work instructions as the main deliverable
unsupported regulatory interpretation beyond supplied sources
marketing or culture copy disguised as policy
typical_inputs: policy objective, audience, and risk context
source requirements from laws, standards, contracts, or internal decisions
current draft, known issues, or policy gaps
scope boundaries, roles, and enforcement context
exception path, approval rights, and review cadence
related procedures, controls, or records requirements
